enterprise._comment: Enterprise policy model foundation. Legacy roles remain authoritative for current enforcement; this section names the lifecycle gates, decision order, and high-blast-radius resource classes for enterprise governance tooling.

read-only-tools.description: Low-blast-radius read-only tools suitable for standing scope.

high-blast-radius-tools.description: Actions that should require explicit JIT or custom enterprise approval.

_comment: Deny-by-default RBAC. An agent's role grants an explicit allow-list of models and tools. Anything not listed is denied. This is the Foundation-tier 'least agency' control: each agent reaches only the model APIs and tools its function requires.

demo-agent.description: Role used by the bundled end-to-end demo. Allows one model and read-only tools so each demo step exercises a distinct control. email.send is never in standing scope — it requires explicit JIT elevation.

research-agent.description: Read-only research assistant. May summarize and search the internal knowledge base; cannot send email or write to databases.

ops-agent.description: Operations assistant. Read-only DB access for incident triage, restricted to business hours (ABAC).

comms-agent.description: Customer-comms drafting agent. Can search KB; email.send requires JIT elevation. Risk-adaptive: denies medium+ risk requests.

workflow-agent.description: Durable workflow operator. May query Temporal workflows through standing scope; high-blast-radius start/signal actions require JIT elevation.
